_comment: PhantomNet Sprint Config — Week 18 (Month 5 Week 2: TAXII Feed & MITRE ATT&CK Visualization, Days 26-30)
milestone_description: Implementation of local LLM narrative integration, TAXII feed server, MITRE ATT&CK visualization, PDF export, and batch operations.

tasks.Title: Design TAXII 2.1 Feed Endpoint Architecture
tasks.Objective: Design the API endpoints, schemas, and data access layer for exposing Sentinel STIX 2.1 playbooks via a custom TAXII 2.1 server in the FastAPI backend.
Tasks: Define the FastAPI endpoint routes matching TAXII 2.1 specifications (Discovery, Collections, Objects).
Specify response and request JSON schemas matching the TAXII 2.1 standards using Pydantic models.
Plan the query logic to retrieve approved SentinelPlaybook records and convert them to compliant STIX 2.1 bundles.
Deliverables: Detailed API contract and design spec documenting TAXII 2.1 server endpoints, routing, and database retrieval.

tasks.Title: Create api/taxii.py — TAXII Discovery Endpoint
tasks.Objective: Implement the initial `/taxii2/` discovery endpoint to return the TAXII 2.1 discovery document containing system-wide api_roots.
Tasks: Create the new backend file `backend/api/taxii.py` and register the router in `backend/main.py`.
Implement `GET /taxii2/` to return discovery metadata including title, description, and contact info.
Ensure discovery responses use custom media type `application/taxii+json;version=2.1`.
Deliverables: FastAPI route `/taxii2/` returning discovery document with correct headers and structure.
Warnings: Note that this is building a TAXII SERVER (serving our STIX data). Do not confuse this with using a client library to parse external feeds.

tasks.Title: Research MITRE ATT&CK Matrix Visualization Libraries
tasks.Objective: Evaluate front-end options (custom CSS grid, D3, table components) for rendering the 12-tactic MITRE ATT&CK matrix in a responsive and performant dashboard widget.
Tasks: Compare rendering methods (CSS Grid, HTML Table, SVG/D3) based on layout complexity and performance.
Document browser compatibility and responsiveness considerations for a 12-column layout.
Draft CSS rules and utility components needed to support dark mode dynamic styling.
Deliverables: Research report (`docs/mitre_visualization_research.md`) documenting styling choice and structural requirements.

tasks.Title: Build src/components/sentinel/MitreMatrix.jsx Scaffold
tasks.Objective: Create the layout scaffold of the MITRE ATT&CK Matrix component containing all 12 tactics as column headers.
Tasks: Create frontend component `frontend-dev/src/components/sentinel/MitreMatrix.jsx`.
Define CSS/JSX structure mapping 12 standard tactics (Initial Access, Execution, etc.) as headers.
Set up empty technique cell placeholders under each tactic to prepare for dynamic rendering.
Deliverables: React component scaffold `MitreMatrix.jsx` displaying the 12-tactic headers in a clean grid/table layout.
Warnings: Ensure you use CSS variables matching the existing ThemeProvider variables. Do NOT hardcode colors.

tasks.Title: Build TAXII Collections Endpoint
tasks.Objective: Implement the TAXII collections metadata endpoint `GET /taxii2/phantomnet/collections/` to expose collections information.
Tasks: Implement `GET /taxii2/phantomnet/collections/` returning list of STIX collection resources.
Define Pydantic schema for Collections responses according to the TAXII 2.1 standard.
Query database to determine available collection mappings (e.g. honeypot source, campaign types).
Deliverables: FastAPI endpoint `/taxii2/phantomnet/collections/` returning list of collections.

tasks.Title: Build TAXII Objects Endpoint
tasks.Objective: Implement the TAXII objects retrieval endpoint `GET /taxii2/phantomnet/collections/{id}/objects/` returning STIX bundles.
Tasks: Implement collections objects endpoint to query SentinelPlaybook database entries.
Map stored playbooks and corresponding STIX structures into a single STIX 2.1 bundle object.
Handle request errors such as missing collection IDs or invalid path parameters.
Deliverables: FastAPI endpoint `/taxii2/phantomnet/collections/{id}/objects/` serving valid STIX bundle JSON.

tasks.Title: Create MITRE ATT&CK Matrix Data Structure
tasks.Objective: Define the mapping between playbooks and the 12 tactics/techniques, and implement aggregation queries to feed the heatmap.
Tasks: Map all 12 techniques to their respective tactics in a structured config or JSON mapping.
Write db helper logic to count playbooks grouped by technique ID.
Validate data aggregation output against database records.
Deliverables: Data model configuration and playbook count aggregation helper methods.

tasks.Title: Build MitreMatrix with Color-Coded Heatmap
tasks.Objective: Implement dynamic cell rendering in the MitreMatrix based on frequency counts to create a heatmap.
Tasks: Update `MitreMatrix.jsx` to receive dynamic data list of technique frequencies.
Map frequencies to heat colors (e.g., none -> transparent/gray, low -> pale yellow, high -> dark red).
Apply clean CSS transitions for cell highlight states.
Deliverables: Updated `MitreMatrix.jsx` showing styled heat colors matching technique counts.

tasks.Title: Add Content-Type Negotiation to TAXII Endpoints
tasks.Objective: Enforce content-type negotiation on TAXII endpoints to strictly adhere to the TAXII 2.1 protocol.
Tasks: Add middleware or dependency checks to inspect the `Accept` and `Content-Type` headers.
Return HTTP status code `406 Not Acceptable` if requested header is not `application/stix+json;version=2.1` or `application/taxii+json;version=2.1`.
Verify header validation rules in FastAPI.
Deliverables: Enforced headers checks on `/taxii2/` and collections routes returning 406 on mismatch.
Warnings: TAXII 2.1 requires the content-type response header `application/stix+json;version=2.1`. Ensure this negotiation is strictly checked.

tasks.Title: Test TAXII Endpoints with taxii2-client Library
tasks.Objective: Establish automated testing using the official `taxii2-client` python package to consume our local TAXII server.
Tasks: Ensure `taxii2-client` package is installed and documented in `requirements.txt`.
Write a test client script that queries the discovery root and pulls STIX bundles.
Verify compatibility and fix any response formatting issues.
Deliverables: Automated script verifying endpoint discovery and bundle retrieval via `taxii2-client`.
Warnings: Use the `taxii2-client` pip package for verifying discovery and collections. Handle potential authentication or connection errors gracefully.

tasks.Title: Add /api/sentinel/mitre/matrix API Endpoint
tasks.Objective: Expose the aggregated MITRE ATT&CK counts and metadata through a dedicated dashboard API endpoint.
Tasks: Create FastAPI endpoint `/api/sentinel/mitre/matrix`.
Query playbook database records and format payload into tactic -> technique arrays with counts, names, and IDs.
Verify endpoint output schema against frontend requirements.
Deliverables: FastAPI endpoint `/api/sentinel/mitre/matrix` yielding aggregated JSON data.

tasks.Title: Add MitreMatrix to SentinelDashboard as a Tab/Section
tasks.Objective: Integrate the MitreMatrix component into the Sentinel Dashboard UI using a navigation tab.
Tasks: Modify SentinelDashboard page to support a tab selection (Playbooks List vs. ATT&CK Coverage).
Fetch live matrix data from `/api/sentinel/mitre/matrix` on component mount.
Add loading indicators and handle empty/error states.
Deliverables: Dashboard UI integration featuring the live ATT&CK matrix view tab.

tasks.Title: Add Filtering to TAXII Objects Endpoint
tasks.Objective: Support URL query parameter filtering (`?added_after=`) on the TAXII objects endpoint.
Tasks: Add `added_after` timestamp query parameter to `/taxii2/phantomnet/collections/{id}/objects/`.
Filter query results from SentinelPlaybook database table based on timestamp.
Validate timestamp formatting matching ISO 8601/RFC 3339.
Deliverables: Updated objects endpoint accepting `added_after` parameter and filtering playbooks correctly.
Warnings: Filter playbooks based on the `added_after` parameter. Ensure date parsing is robust against various formats and handles invalid timezone offsets gracefully.

tasks.Title: Write tests/test_taxii.py
tasks.Objective: Develop comprehensive unit and integration tests for the new TAXII endpoints.
Tasks: Create backend test file `backend/tests/test_taxii.py`.
Test Discovery, Collections, and Objects endpoints with mock database states.
Verify HTTP responses, content negotation errors, and query filtering.
Deliverables: Fully passing test suite `test_taxii.py` running in pytest.
Warnings: Ensure to cover all HTTP status codes, invalid paths, and content negotiation headers. Run tests with pytest.

tasks.Title: Add Click Interaction to MitreMatrix
tasks.Objective: Enable click interactions on technique cells in the MitreMatrix to trigger filtered views.
Tasks: Update technique cells in `MitreMatrix.jsx` to render click handlers.
Define state variables to store the selected technique ID on click.
Pass selected technique up to the dashboard layout to trigger detail popup/filter.
Deliverables: Interactive matrix component with functional onClick callbacks.

tasks.Title: Build Technique Detail Popup/Panel
tasks.Objective: Develop a slide-out panel or detail modal showing specific information for the clicked MITRE technique.
Tasks: Create component `TechniqueDetailPanel.jsx` (or inline detail view).
Render technique descriptions, detection counts, and list of associated playbooks.
Add external link targeting the official MITRE ATT&CK page for the technique.
Deliverables: Technique detail UI displaying lists of relevant playbooks when technique is selected.

tasks.Title: Verify TAXII Interoperability and End-to-End Feed Integration
tasks.Objective: Perform full system E2E verification of the TAXII server integration and document the interoperability contract.
Tasks: Test the discovery, collections, and objects endpoints in a production-like staging environment.
Write the interoperability guide `docs/taxii_interoperability.md` describing routing, media-types, and headers.
Participate in the team-wide end-to-end integration verification.
Deliverables: Comprehensive integration test sign-off and documentation file `docs/taxii_interoperability.md`.

tasks.Title: Test TAXII Server and Validate STIX Bundles
tasks.Objective: Run validations against the STIX bundles served by the TAXII server to verify schema compliance.
Tasks: Perform schema validation using python stix2 validation tools if available, or compare against STIX 2.1 schema specifications.
Document compliance verification results and fix any anomalies.
Participate in the team-wide end-to-end integration verification.
Deliverables: Validation report verifying that STIX bundles parsed match STIX 2.1 syntax.

tasks.Title: Verify Real-Time ATT&CK Matrix Updates and Generation Pipeline
tasks.Objective: Verify that generating new playbook incidents dynamically updates the MITRE ATT&CK matrix heatmap in real-time.
Tasks: Trigger new simulated campaigns (e.g. SSH brute force, SQL injection) in the pipeline.
Verify that detection counts increment correctly in the database and the `/api/sentinel/mitre/matrix` API response.
Participate in the team-wide end-to-end integration verification.
Deliverables: Real-time update verification report or script output showing matrix sync correctness.

tasks.Title: Polish MitreMatrix Layout, Tooltips, and Responsiveness
tasks.Objective: Apply final aesthetic polish, add interactive tooltips, and verify responsiveness of the MitreMatrix component.
Tasks: Apply final styles to the MitreMatrix component (glow effects, premium borders, responsive CSS layout).
Add tooltips displaying technique details (ID, name, description, playbook count) on hover.
Participate in the team-wide end-to-end integration verification.
Deliverables: Polished, responsive `MitreMatrix.jsx` UI component with active tooltips and state validation.
